title: FST Top module cannot be fully hidden
body:
```
Ubuntu 22.04.4 LTS
Verilator 5.027 devel rev v5.026-4-g833df6d9e
```

I found that doing `--main-top-name "-"` (https://github.com/verilator/verilator/pull/4249) does not work properly with `--trace-fst`.

```systemverilog
module tb;
    wire a = 0;
    initial begin
        $dumpfile( "dump.vcd" );
        $dumpvars;
        $finish;
    end
endmodule
```

## Without `--trace-fst`

```shell
verilator tb.sv \
          --binary \
          --main-top-name "-" \
          --trace
```
![gtkwave without trace-fst](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/ff01913b-117e-4593-ad2b-d33970b3a932)

## With `--trace-fst`
```shell
verilator tb.sv \
          --binary \
          --main-top-name "-" \
          --trace-fst
```
![gtkwave with trace-fst](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/3572d8b5-2695-4896-9e2f-e4416ab502a5)


Looping in @dwilliamson in case.

I can look into this when I get some time.
